extra.reason: Fixed: claude profile ReadyPattern '>' -> 'Remote Control active' (matches the --remote-control footer present in both default and HTTP launch paths; '>' never matched v2.x glyph '❯'). Verified live: handshake now reaches idle, not failed. Regression test added in profile_test.go.

Fixed: added screen-quiescence working->idle transition to health monitor (quiescentIdle + idleQuiescence, per-session runState). Guarded by WorkingIndicator so a busy-but-quiet agent is not falsely idled; added WorkingIndicator 'esc to interrupt' to claude profile (codex already had 'Working'). Verified live on both agents incl. a 25s silent task that correctly stayed 'working'. Unit tests added in health/monitor_test.go.

Implemented /session/capture + /session/send HTTP shims over daemon Capture/SendPrompt; 6 handler tests pass; docs/http-api.md updated.

Added internal/project registry (projects.toml, slug->repo_cwd+plan_globs) + /sessions?project= filter (cwd-under-repo OR owner_id tag); nil-safe daemon load; unknown project -> empty. 7 tests pass; docs updated.

Added /babysit/new (mint project-scoped context: panes+repo_cwd+plan_refs+server, bbolt-persisted, TTL) and /babysit/context (resolve, lazy expiry). Distinct ?context= token. store bucket+methods + 5 daemon tests pass; docs updated.

Added optional config http_auth_token + withAuth middleware: loopback always open, non-loopback requires Bearer (constant-time compare), 401 otherwise; disabled when empty. 2 tests (table + 401) pass; docs Authentication section added.

B keystone complete: B1 capture/send shims, B2 project registry+filter, B3 babysit context mint/lookup (bbolt+TTL), B4 server-side bearer auth. Full arcmux suite green; docs/http-api.md updated. A (voxtop relay) is now unblocked.
voxtop babysit mode shipped: MODES[babysit] + babysit_tools (pane/plan/beads tools), two-phase confirm gate, ?context= handoff in main.py. 9 tests + 25 relay regression tests pass.

Web prototype built in ~/Projects/voice-controlled-pm (index.html/app.js/serve.sh): mic->WS->relay, audio playback, tool/transcript feed. JS syntax-checked, serves 200. Full voice loop validation needs live voxtop server+xAI key+mic (manual).

Multi-server implemented: ServerEntry model + savedServers in VoxDefaults, AppState add/remove/select + migration seed, SettingsView picker+add. serverHost stays the active-host accessor. CODE COMPLETE; needs macOS xcodegen+build to verify (no Swift toolchain on Linux).

iOS push+tray+deep-link+connect code complete: BabysitInvite/Store, BabysitAppDelegate (APNs reg+token+routing), vox://babysit handling, ConverseService ?context= + babysit mode, ConverseView/MainTabView routing, BabysitTrayView, Settings entry, Info.plist/entitlements. Plists validated. Needs macOS build + APNs key/provisioning + arcmux push sender (operational).

Babysitter voice mode shipped end-to-end: B (arcmux subsystem, go tests green), A (voxtop relay mode + two-phase confirm gate, 84 server tests green), A.5 (web prototype built). C (iOS multi-server) and D (iOS push/tray/connect) code-complete pending macOS Xcode build + APNs provisioning + arcmux push sender.

Babysit session live on voxtop (worker vox-worker, context minted, deep link+QR delivered) AND the server-side handoff is now headlessly verified + regression-tested. Remaining iOS-UI leg tracked as voxtop-nq8 for the Mac runner.
Updated the HTTP daemon Codex remote command constant and matching singleton-detection tests from 'cdx remote-server' to 'cdx remote-control'; verified with go test ./internal/daemon.
